title: Intruder (disambiguation)
content:
'''Intruder''' can refer to:
*[[Intruder (Victory II-class)|''Intruder'']], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]]
*[[Intruder (Marauder-class)|''Intruder'']], a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Marauder-class corvette|''Marauder''-class corvette]].
*[[Intruder (Namana-class)|''Intruder'']], a [[Bakuran]] [[Namana-class light cruiser|''Namana''-class light cruiser]].
*[[Intruder computer spike]], a member of the product family of [[MicroThrust computer spike]]s.
*[[Intruder missile]]s, a special-purpose warhead by [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]] and [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].
*''[[Starlight Intruder]]'', a smuggling vessel.

{{Disambig}}

|de=Eindringling
